html:
Exclusive to:

The Quackering Ram is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab, requires a Quacken Beak, 4 Bamboo and 4 Ropes to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Quackering Ram can be attached to Boats, allowing the player to ram Mobs and Structures, dealing damage. When the player is on the way towards a Structure or Mob, they will 'charge' when close to it and deal 150 damage.

Trivia

  • The Quackering Ram was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

Bugs

  • Equipping the Quackering Ram on a boat will temporarily give it the charge boost. A large free speed boost can be obtained by continuously equipping and unequipping.

Gallery

  • Quackering Ram as seen in the poster for the Home Sea Home update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

The Quackering Ram is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab, requires a Quacken Beak, 4 Bamboo and 4 Ropes to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Quackering Ram can be attached to Boats, allowing the player to ram Mobs and Structures, dealing damage. When the player is on the way towards a Structure or Mob, they will 'charge' when close to it and deal 150 damage.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Quackering Ram was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ram Quackering là một Vật phẩm chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng Hải, yêu cầu Mỏ Quacken, 4 Tre và 4 Dây Thừng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Quackering Ram có thể được gắn vào Thuyền, cho phép người chơi đâm Mob và Công trình, gây sát thương. Khi người chơi đang trên đường tới một Công trình hoặc Mob, họ sẽ 'tấn công' khi đến gần nó và gây 150 sát thương.

The '''Quackering Ram''' is a craftable [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Nautical Tab]], requires a [[Quacken Beak]], 4 [[Bamboo]] and 4 [[Rope]]s to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The Quackering Ram can be attached to [[Boats]], allowing the player to ram [[Mobs]] and [[Structures]], dealing damage. When the player is on the way towards a Structure or Mob, they will 'charge' when close to it and deal 150 damage.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Quackering Ram was added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21st, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

=={{pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs==
*Equipping the Quackering Ram on a boat will temporarily give it the charge boost. A large free [[Player Speed|speed boost]] can be obtained by continuously equipping and unequipping.
